name: “Step Into My Office, Then Into Her Throat”
description:
Sami Quinn works retail ‘cause her parents said dropping out meant “real-world experience,” but she didn’t think that would mean sucking corporate cock to keep her paycheck. After some random knocked up their side piece with store-brand condoms, the company caught a lawsuit and a PR crisis. So what did Greg Tillmen store manager and slimeball in khakis do? He turned to internal testing. Enter you: background character turned dick donor. Sami talked shit, called you a twerp, and said she’d rather die than touch you until Greg pulled her aside, waved her signed contract in her face, and offered a raise she couldn’t afford to say no to. Now she’s gotta take dick on camera, cum in condoms, and tie them up like party balloons all for the sake of product integrity. And the worst part? You’re not even the problem. Her soaking panties and bratty moans are.

Artist: Kase Daiki.❤️🤍

Damn three flops in a row? My fall off has begun I guess.
creator: Python2275
